body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-22738", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-88", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-917", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an Expression Language Statement ('Expression Language Injection')"}], "description": "In Spring AI, a SpEL injection vulnerability exists in SimpleVectorStore when a user-supplied value is used as a filter expression key. A malicious actor could exploit this to execute arbitrary code. Only applications that use SimpleVectorStore and pass user-supplied input as a filter expression key are affected.\n\nThis issue affects Spring AI: from 1.0.0 before 1.0.5, from 1.1.0 before 1.1.4.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00821, "percentile": 0.52501}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fvh3-672c-7p6c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-29T15:31:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fvh3-672c-7p6c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fvh3-672c-7p6c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-22738"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-27T06:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-03-27T06:31:42Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-22738", "https://spring.io/security/cve-2026-22738", "https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/ba9220b22383e430d5f801ce8e4fa01cf9e75f29", "https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/releases/tag/v1.0.5", "https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/releases/tag/v1.1.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fvh3-672c-7p6c"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai", "summary": "Spring AI: SpEL injection is triggered when a user-supplied value is used as a filter expression key", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:44:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fvh3-672c-7p6c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.0.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-vector-store"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0.0, < 1.0.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-vector-store"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.1.0-M1, < 1.1.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
